questionTitle: Are you applying for yourself or someone else?

myself.label: I am applying for myself
myself.hint: Including if you are applying with joint tenants on the same agreement

someoneElse.label: I am applying on behalf of someone else
someoneElse.hint: As a legal or non-legal representative

applyingForYourselfOrSomeoneElse.required: Select whether you are applying for yourself or someone else
